name: Basket
notes: Three handlers on one page: OnGet (view), OnPost (add item from catalog), OnPostUpdate (update quantities in batch).

Anonymous users are identified by a GUID stored in a 10-year essential cookie (Constants.BASKET_COOKIENAME); authenticated users are identified by their username — both paths share the same basket storage.
OnPost is the target of the ADD TO BASKET form in _product.cshtml (catalog page); it resolves the item price server-side from CatalogItem.Price and ignores any client-supplied price.

OnPostUpdate uses Ardalis.Result<Basket> — SetQuantities returns Result<Basket>; implicit operator converts it to Basket before passing to Map(); items with quantity 0 are removed via basket.RemoveEmptyItems().
